name: Shopping.com Product Data Feed Setup
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image1]"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know!"}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Shopping.com Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Compare millions of products from hundreds of merchants all in one place. Shop, compare and save time and money!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto\u00a0uses data feeds to send product information to Shopping.com to update your products through the shopping comparison website."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image2]"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sign up for an account through the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://www.shopping.com", "children": [{"text": "http://www.shopping.com/"}]}, {"text": " website."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Copy your Account ID. You'll need to add it into Neto shortly."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Other", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shopping Comparison Feeds", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate Shopping.com and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image3]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add your Shopping.com "}, {"text": "Account ID", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image4]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll be provided with a "}, {"text": "Feed URL", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Provide this URL to Shopping.com. This is a link to a file that contains a list of your products in the required format."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image5]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can modify the Feed URL, filtering products that you don\u2019t wish to push to Shopping.com. To do this, click the "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image6]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the "}, {"text": "File Builder", "bold": true}, {"text": " section and click the "}, {"text": "Filter", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab to make products, categories, pricing and other changes. Scroll down and click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image7]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To make changes to the feed, simply scroll back up the top and click the "}, {"text": "Generate Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and click "}, {"text": "Download Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to review the results of your changes.\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image8]"}]}]}]}]
